response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify distinct segments, primarily promotional material for various Hololive projects. 2. Identified only one segment containing vocal music (01:15 - 01:53). 3. Extracted song title '#きゅるるん大作戦' and performer 'hololive 3rd Generation' from on-screen text. 4. Performed a search for lyrics using the query '"きゅるるん大作戦" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics'. The search confirmed '#きゅるるん大作戦' is the project name/EP title, not necessarily the specific song title, and did not yield direct, reliable lyrics for a song of that exact name. 5. Set lyric fields to null due to lack of a definitive match for the specific track lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video consisting of various promotional clips for Hololive events (New Year Game Festival, Tokino Sora's concert, Hololive 3rd Generation Live and stream, and DEV_IS/ReGloss costume reveal) and a 3rd Generation music performance segment.

scenes.description: Intro sequence for 'Hololive New Year Game Festival 2026'.
Promotional clip for Tokino Sora's 'Dreaming In Motion' 2026 concert.
Music video performance by Hololive 3rd Generation. Text overlay says '#きゅるるん大作戦'.
Promo clip for the '3rd Generation 24-hour stream'.
Promotional clip for 'hololive DEV_IS' (ReGloss) New Year costume reveal.
Promotional clip for new 'Flowing Glow' voice packs.
Countdown sequence for 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025-2026'.
